nasb.text: So I said, “Where are you going?” And he said to me, “To measure Jerusalem, to see how wide it is and how long it is.”

esv.text: Then I said, “Where are you going?” And he said to me, “To measure Jerusalem, to see what is its width and what is its length.”

cnv.text: 我問他：“你到哪裡去？”他對我說：“我要去量度耶路撒冷，看看有多寬，有多長。”

ccb.text: 于是我问：“你要去哪里？”他回答说：“去丈量耶路撒冷，看看有多宽多长。”
